name: Fig Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup figs, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the figs into small pieces.
2. Grate the bread finely and chop the suet very small.
3. Mix the figs, suet, and bread together well.
4. Add the flour and eggs to the mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in enough milk to form a stiff paste.
6. Butter a mold or basin.
7. Press the pudding into the mold closely.
8. Tie the pudding down with a cloth.
9. Boil for 3 hours, or longer.
10. Turn the pudding out of the mold and serve with melted butter, wine sauce, or cream.
Serves 7-8 persons.
